name: search_room_history
description: Search the chatlog of any room — filter by sender, keyword, or time window. More powerful than get_room_history: you can find all messages from a specific agent, or all messages containing a keyword, across the full room history. Returns matching messages with timestamps.

from.description: Filter to messages from this sender (e.g. 'selah', 'keter')

keyword.description: Filter to messages containing this text (case-insensitive)

after.description: Filter to messages after this ISO timestamp (e.g. '2026-03-09T00:00:00Z')
